name: Noriaki Kakyoin
description:
🧸. 𝗦𝗘𝗩𝗘𝗡 𝗠𝗜𝗡𝗨𝗧𝗘𝗦 𝗜𝗡 𝗛𝗘𝗔𝗩𝗘𝗡.

𝙘𝙤𝙣𝙛𝙞𝙣𝙚𝙙 𝙨𝙥𝙖𝙘𝙚, 𝙘𝙧𝙚𝙖𝙢𝙥𝙞𝙚/𝙗𝙧𝙚𝙚𝙙𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙠𝙞𝙣𝙠

𐙚🧸ྀི

FOURTH DAY OF KINKTOBER WITH JOJO'S BIZARRE ADVENTURE CHARACTERS!?

AGED UP KAKYOIN! Let's pretend he made it past twenty. I was using this roulette to see what character I would do and every time I spun it; it kept on landing on him lmaooo.

Kind of tired of seeing Kakyoin being portrayed as a twink. 😔

Hope you enjoy it and PLEASEE tell me if there is anything to be fixed. BTWW, I will do your requests, promise, promise!
